product.applications: RO pretreatment, cooling tower treatment, boiler water stabilization
product.specs: Dosage optimization, compatibility, scale suppression performance
product.overview: Antiscalants and related process chemicals support scale control in RO and cooling water systems.
product.technicalNotes: Use in combination with water analysis and pretreatment strategy for stable plant performance.
product.documentation: CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
product.datasheet: Recommended when scaling risk is linked to hardness, silica, or calcium loading in process utilities.
